name: Old Fashioned Fruit Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare two 9x5-inch loaf pans or one 8-inch square pan.
2. In a bowl, combine peels, raisins, currants, pecans, and cherries. Pour in rum; mix well. Cover and let stand at room temperature for 8 hours or up to 24 hours is best.
3. Toss with 1/2 cup of the flour; set aside.
4. Combine remaining flour, baking powder, cinnamon, cloves, nutmeg, allspice, and salt; set aside.
5. In a large bowl, cream butter with sugar until fluffy. Beat in eggs, one at a time, molasses, and vanilla, beating well.
6. Stir in flour mixture just until blended; stir in fruit mixture.
7. Turn into prepared pans.
8. Bake at 250°F for about 3 hours for loaf pans or 4 1/2 hours for square cake pan or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Let cool in pans on a rack for 30 minutes; remove from pans.
10. Remove paper and let cool completely on a rack.
